language_policy.card_names: English canonical names plus Japanese aliases
language_policy.notes: Japanese notes are included only in *_ja fields for human review.

deck_summary.deck_name: Iono's Lightning / Voltorb scaling + Bellibolt ex engine + Kilowattrel backup
deck_summary.strategy_summary_en: Use Iono's Bellibolt ex primarily as an energy acceleration engine, spread Basic Lightning Energy across multiple Iono's Pokemon, increase Iono's Voltorb damage through Lightning Energy in play, and use Voltorb as the main non-ex scaling attacker when its expected damage is sufficient. Bellibolt ex and Kilowattrel are backup attackers or closers, not the default win condition.
deck_summary.strategy_summary_ja: Iono's Bellibolt exを主にエネルギー加速エンジンとして使い、複数のIono'sポケモンへ基本雷エネルギーを展開してVoltorbの打点を伸ばす。Voltorbが十分な打点を出せる場合は、非exのスケーリングアタッカーとして主軸にする。Bellibolt ex/Kilowattrelはバックアップまたは詰め役として扱う。

attack_option_rule.notes_en: Treat only option type 13 with attackId as an attack. Do not treat type 12 as an attack.
attack_option_rule.notes_ja: 攻撃は type=13 かつ attackIdありのみ。type=12はRetreat扱いにする。

fallback_rule.notes_en: Card effect data is used for scoring and fallback only. If the simulator exposes a legal action, prefer the simulator's select.option over hardcoded assumptions.
fallback_rule.notes_ja: カード効果データはスコア評価・fallback用。実際の合法/違法は環境のselect.optionを優先する。

prefer_voltorb_when: Voltorb has at least 2 energy and legal attack
Voltorb estimated damage reaches a KO or meaningful pressure threshold
Bellibolt ex attack does not provide a clear damage/KO advantage over Voltorb
keeping Bellibolt ex on bench as engine reduces 2-prize exposure
win_condition_policy.bellibolt_role: primary energy engine and backup/closer attacker
win_condition_policy.kilowattrel_role: backup non-ex attacker and draw support

policy.attach_policy_en: First make Voltorb attack-ready, then spread Lightning Energy across Iono's Pokemon to increase Voltorb damage while preparing Bellibolt ex/Kilowattrel as backup.
counts_for: Iono's Bellibolt ex energy acceleration targets
Energy Retrieval / Night Stretcher / Max Rod recovery

attacks.rules_text_en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Lightning Energy attached to all of your Iono's Pokemon.

policy.notes_en: Voltorb is the main scaling win-condition attacker. Its damage increases from Lightning Energy on all own Iono's Pokemon, not only energy attached to Voltorb.

269.name_ja: アノコのハラバリー ex

abilities.rules_text_en: As often as you like during your turn, you may attach a Basic Lightning Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Iono's Pokemon.
policy_use_cases: enable Bellibolt ex attack when needed
convert energy-heavy hand into board pressure
distribute Lightning Energy across Iono's Pokemon
abilities.notes_en: Primary role is the energy engine. Do not over-prefer Bellibolt ex attacking if Voltorb scaling damage is already better or more prize-efficient.

attacks.rules_text_en: 230 damage. During your next turn, this Pokemon can't attack.

simulator_override.reason_en: Enable only if the competition simulator demonstrably differs from official text.

attacks.rules_text_en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

271.name_ja: アノコのタイクイブン

abilities.rules_text_en: You must discard a Basic Lightning Energy from this Pokemon in order to use this Ability. Once during your turn, you may draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.
abilities.policy_warning: Do not discard the last Lightning Energy from an attacking Kilowattrel unless the draw is worth delaying the attack or Voltorb scaling remains strong.

1086.rules_text_en: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokemon with 70 HP or less and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

1097.rules_text_en: Put a Pokemon or a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

1110.rules_text_en: Put up to 5 in any combination of Pokemon and Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

1118.rules_text_en: Put up to 2 Basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

policy.notes_en: Recovered Lightning is valuable because Bellibolt ex can immediately spread it to boost Voltorb damage.

1121.rules_text_en: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand. Search your deck for a Pokemon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

1152.rules_text_en: Search your deck for a Pokemon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. Pokemon ex, Pokemon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.

policy.notes_ja: Bellibolt exはRule Box持ちなので検索不可。Voltorbを非ex主力として探す価値がある。

1227.rules_text_en: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards. If you have exactly 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

1233.rules_text_en: You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand. Search your deck for up to 4 Lightning Pokemon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

1254.rules_text_en: Once during each player's turn, that player may put up to 2 Basic Lightning Energy cards from their discard pile into their hand.

synergy: Bellibolt ex can attach recovered Basic Lightning Energy

recommended_engine_functions.load_card_effects: Load this JSON once and cache it.
recommended_engine_functions.is_attack_option: type == 13 and attackId is not None
recommended_engine_functions.estimate_damage: Use card effect data for damage scoring; select.option remains the legal-action source of truth.
recommended_engine_functions.estimate_voltorb_damage: 20 + 20 * count Lightning Energy attached to all own Iono's Pokemon.
recommended_engine_functions.score_action: Combine legal action, card effect, tactical context, and safety penalties. Prefer the best expected damage / KO / prize-efficiency attacker, not a fixed Bellibolt-first attacker ranking.
